## [03:01 - 04:42]

You can set the batch quantity right here. For example, we're going to say send 15 emails at a time, and we can say repeat after every one hour. Next, just go ahead and select the appropriate time window. For instance, we want these emails to be sent out during office hours and on weekdays. Just go ahead and uncheck Saturday and Sunday. Select the start time. We're going to set this to 8 AM. And the end time, for our example, we're going to use 5 PM. With these settings, the system is going to ensure that it sends out 50 emails at a time and repeat this batch process after every one hour on during office hours on weekdays. Then simply go ahead and modify all the settings as you desire and hit the Schedule button. And let the system take care of the rest for you. Once you've scheduled the email campaign, it is going to appear in the list in the Campaigns menu right here. You can also view all the statistics of your existing email campaigns. This section summarizes your email campaign performance and provides you with valuable insights, such as how many emails were delivered, how many were opened, how many were clicked, as well as how many of them were actually bounced.
